home.title: Home
home.description: Comprehensive enterprise management system for you.

guide.login_desc: Enter your email address and password to log in to OpenERP.
guide.login_settings_desc: You can switch languages or toggle dark mode here.
guide.login_mobile_desc: Enter your email address and password to log in to OpenERP on Mobile.
guide.login_mobile_settings_desc: Switch language preference or toggle dark mode on the header.
guide.register_desc: Enter company name, admin email and password to get started.
guide.register_settings_desc: Switch language preference and toggle dark mode in the top right corner.
guide.register_mobile_desc: Enter company name, admin email and password to get started.
guide.register_mobile_settings_desc: Switch language preference or toggle dark mode on the header.
guide.home_desc: Welcome to OpenERP Enterprise Management System. This is your home dashboard.
guide.home_org_desc: Click here to view and edit corporate branch and hierarchical department trees.
guide.home_mobile_desc: Welcome to OpenERP Enterprise Management System. This is your mobile home dashboard.
guide.home_mobile_org_desc: Tap here to view and edit corporate branch and hierarchical department trees.
guide.org_branches_desc: List of current branches. You can view details or add new physical branches.
guide.org_depts_desc: Hierarchical department layout. You can drag and drop departments to reorganize them.
guide.org_seed_desc: If the business does not have departments, select an industry and click Seed Data.
guide.org_details_desc: Selecting a branch or department will display its details and employee directory here.
guide.org_mobile_branches_desc: List of current branches. Tap any branch to edit or delete it.
guide.org_mobile_depts_desc: Hierarchical department layout of the organization.
guide.org_mobile_seed_desc: If no departments exist, select an industry to automatically generate structure templates.
guide.org_mobile_details_desc: View metadata details and employee list of the selected node.
